full_text:
Plan for sample S105 culturing,

Wednesday 01.09.21

Edit!

Patient was inoperable - only ascites received

Total cell count: / ml

! Pre-coat all the wells with omentum-gel:

30-40 uL for 48-well plates and 8 uL for 96-wells !

A) RNA/DNA extraction + FFPE sample (4 drops):

48-well plate

DNA/RNA + FFPE: 34 wells x 40 µl x = 1700 µl

2000 cells/µl = 3.40E6 cells

→ make 2 x 1.5 ml eppendorfs, 850 µl each

volume to take from cell suspension:

cells in medium →

ome-gel → 120 µl

aprotinin → 2.6 µl

thrombin → 2.6 µl

fibrinogen → 17 µl

→ Let to solidify for 60 min - add 350 uL medium

B) Drug treatment for flow:

48-well plate

9 conditions x 6 wells/condition = 54 wells

54 wells x 50 µl = 2700 µl,

2000 cells/µl = 5.40E6 cells

→ make 3 x 1.5 ml eppendorfs, 900 µl each

volume to take from cell suspension:

cells in medium →

ome-gel → 127 µl

aprotinin → 2.7 µl

thrombin → 2.7 µl

fibrinogen → 18 µl

→ Let to solidify for 60 min - add 300 uL medium

Sample ID: S105_pAsc

C) Drug treatment for IF:

96-well U plate

9 conditions x 6 wells/condition= 54 wells

54 wells x 8 µl = 432 µl → make 500 µl

2000 cells/µl = 1.00E6 cells

→ make 1 x 1.5 ml eppendorf

volume to take from cell suspension:

cells in medium →

ome-gel → 70.5 µl

aprotinin → 1.5 µl

thrombin → 1.5 µl

fibrinogen → 10 µl

→ Let to solidify for 30 min - add 150 uL medium

D) Sample for Flow - Day 0

→ Collect 3.0E6 cells per 900 uL flow staining buffer

E) Sample for cryo

→ Collect cells per 1 mL stemcell banker

Prepare:

Medium

needed 350 uL x 34 = 11.9 mL

54 x 300 uL = 16.2 mL

54 x 150 uL = 8.1 mL ~ 40 mL

Omegel needed = 691.5 uL

aprotinin = 14.8 uL

thrombin = 14.8 uL

fibrinogen = 98 uL

Drug treatment conditions:

Plate 1

control

olaparib 20

pembro 10

ATXi 0.5 uM

ATXi 1 uM

Plate 2

ola + pembro

ola + ATXi 0.5 uM

pembro + ATXi 0.5 uM

ola + pembro + ATXi 0.5 uM

Treatment plan:

Reagent | Stock concentration | Working concentration | Ratio
Omentum gel | 17.7 mg/mL | 2.5 mg/mL | 0.141
Aprotinin | 10 mg/mL | 33.3 ug/mL | 0.003
Thrombin | 100 U | 0.3 U | 0.003
Fibrinogen | 25 ug/mL | 0.5 ug/mL | 0.02

Compound | [Stock] | Location of the stock | [working] | [end]
(350uL / 50uL = 7) | c1v1 = c2v2;
c1*350 uL =c2*X
DMSO (control) | 100 % | RT, lab | 0.2 % | 1.4 % | 4.9 uL
Olaparib | 10 mM | -80 C | 20 uM | 140 uM | 4.9 uL
Pembrolizumab | 5 mg / mL | -20 C | 10 ug / mL | 70 ug / mL | 4.9 uL
ATXi_1 | 1 mM | -80 C | 0.5 uM | 3.5 uM | 1.225 uL
